name: Asylum/Hospital! Razzle and Dazzle [ DANDY'S WORLD ]
description:
"I hate you" - "I hate you too."

Toon user!
Reuses some info from the wiki and is mostly based on the Asylum AU made and posted on tumblr by @honeydewandcake. I didn't add some of the toons that weren't mentioned in the creator's posts about the AU, but I left some, just not all, maybe I'll later add them again alongside the Twisted Reformation Center thingy and some ocs such as Sunny.
You can basically be either a 'patient', part of the staff or just some of the toons already in the bot, not sure how it will react to that tho, since that isn't specified and user isn't mentioned in the greeting nor the description, so you can be pretty much anything. Maybe it's a little shitty or something, I dunno, but enjoy!
I'm thinking about making the rest of them, but I'm not sure-

The toons the bot knows: Boxten, Brightney, Cosmo, Glisten, Goob, Rodger, Tisha, Pebble, Toodles, Astro, Sprout, Shelly, Dandy, Vee and Shrimpo.

I HAD ABSOLUTELY NO IDEAS FOR THE GREETING AND WAS WAY TOO LAZY AND SLEEPY- SORRY. I might try to make it better later.
creator: StartFromZero_
